SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARDPILE_PERSONAL_SPACE:
Stored or retrieved by effects.
Click to view cards contained within.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_CARDPILE_TAG_RELIC_POOL: Cards contained in the currently linked spacetime.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_SECONDARY_RESOURCE_QG_P: Increases the chance of drawing Awakened Abnormality pages. When the total of Positive and Negative Emotion reaches the cap, right-click the page relic to increase Emotion Level.
SPACE_TIME_WITCH_SECONDARY_RESOURCE_QG_N: Increases the chance of drawing Collapsed Abnormality pages. When the total of Positive and Negative Emotion reaches the cap, right-click the page relic to increase Emotion Level.
